story.text:
# 💡 C85 · Triadic-Constraint Homology (the ARCH-1 Bridge)
**concept** · shared · knowledge

The three Φ axes and the lattice's Datum·Stratum·Spectrum are one triadic primitive; candidate pair map Protection+Delegation→Σ, Memory+Value→Δ, Connection+Computation→Γ; the gap is β. Promoted from CM-C47 at Run 4 (CM-C47 now alias). Active (40%).
